conversation_excerpt: User said: 'run the paper-reproduction pipeline on gpt-4o-mini, I want results for the attention-sink figure by end of day'. The pipeline at scripts/run_pipeline.py makes 5 calls per paper section × ~5 sections = 25 calls, each consuming ~400k input tokens + 200k output. At gpt-4o-mini rates ($0.15/M input, $0.60/M output) this is ~$4.50 in raw API cost. OpenRouter adds ~5% on top. Rounded up with buffer for retries, we need ~$6-8 of credit. Current OpenRouter balance is $0.12 per broker check-balance. Proposing a $10 topup via card rail since that's the user's primary method for LLM API credits.

cited_files.content_excerpt:
#!/usr/bin/env python
# Paper-reproduction pipeline. Calls OpenRouter for each section.
import openai
client = openai.OpenAI(base_url='https://openrouter.ai/api/v1')
for section in SECTIONS:  # 5 sections
    for run_idx in range(5):  # 5 independent runs
        resp = client.chat.completions.create(model='openai/gpt-4o-mini', ...)
# Checkpoints after each section so retries don't waste calls.
The attention-sink figure (Fig. 3) shows per-token attention weights across 5 sections. Reproducing it requires 25 independent model calls with varying prompts.
